text: Sable Heron: wind 11.1 m/s; battery 89.72%; ΔP 3.32 kPa; ullage 6.11 bar; avionics 45.28%; star tracker 28.2″; offset 0.49 mrad; gyro 0.51 °/h; RF 3.79 dB; coverage 91.44%; pass 97.84%; cert 4.21.
